steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: The equation is $k+12=336$. Subtract $12$ from both sides: $$k=336-12.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Choice C adds $12$ instead of subtracting; choice D multiplies; choice A comes from dividing by $12$. The inverse operation for $+12$ is subtraction.
